about.title: Yosi
about.stub: A short bio goes here — a few sentences in Yosi's voice about the work, the practice, the studio. The real copy lives in Sanity and lands in milestone 11.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Something caught your eye? You're warmly welcome to reach out — about a particular piece, a commission, or just to say hello. Every message reaches us directly.
contact.stub: Real contact details slot in via Sanity once the CMS is online (milestone 5). Until then these are placeholders.
